embeds.title: Field of Memories
embeds.description:
This song was made in 2006-2007!

This song means a lot to me, its sort of like a tribute to my good childhood memories. inspired by a song mom used to sing at bedtime. its orchestral/techno as usual!

Made with Fruityloops
